ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manga" (
  "manga_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each manga */,
  "manga_name" TEXT /* Title of the manga */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the manga */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the manga */,
  "description" TEXT /* A short description of the manga */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* The URL of the manga's cover image */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* The release date of the manga */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the manga */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the track */,
  "manga_id" TEXT /* ID of the manga being tracked */,
  "track_status" TEXT /* Status of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the track was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_manga_id FOREIGN KEY ("manga_id") REFERENCES manga ("manga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "manga_id" TEXT /* ID of the manga being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_manga_id FOREIGN KEY ("manga_id") REFERENCES manga ("manga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "manga_id" TEXT /* ID of the manga being discussed */,
  "post" TEXT /* Post written by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the post was created */,
  "parent_post_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_manga_id FOREIGN KEY ("manga_id") REFERENCES manga ("manga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_parent_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_post_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "read" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
